b:T2808,<div class="question">
<p>The standard electrode potential of zinc can be measured using a standard hydrogen electrode (SHE).</p>
<p>Draw and annotate the diagram to show the complete apparatus required to measure the standard electrode potential of zinc.</p>
<p style="text-align:center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
</div>c:T168de,<div class="question">
<p><img height="305" src="data:image/png;base64," width="476"/></p>
<p>H<sub>2 </sub>(g) entering at «298 K and» 100 kPa ✔</p>
<p>platinum electrode on left ✔</p>
<p>voltmeter connecting electrodes <em><strong>AND</strong> </em>salt bridge connecting electrolytes ✔</p>
<p>1 mol dm<sup>–3</sup> H<sup>+</sup> on the left <em><strong>AND</strong></em> 1 mol dm<sup>–3 </sup>Zn<sup>2+</sup> on the right ✔</p>
<p> </p>
<p><em>Voltmeter and salt bridge need to be drawn but not necessarily annotated for <strong>M3</strong>.</em></p>
<p><em>Concentrations, but not state symbols, required for <strong>M4</strong>.</em></p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/chemistry/topic/19/","children":["← back to ","Chemistry"," topic ","19"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"21N.2.HL.TZ0.8"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Chemistry"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","2"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"21N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","19-1-electrochemical-cells"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$c"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n[N/A]\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
